title: Vivid Malaysian Egg Noodle Bowl
description: A peppery, dairy-free egg noodle bowl with a melt-in-your-mouth cheese pull, perfect for a quick sick‑day meal.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and blanch the egg noodles for 2 minutes, then drain and set aside.
In the same pot, heat 1 tbsp of oil over medium heat, add minced garlic and ginger, and sauté for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Pour in vegetable broth and coconut milk, bring to a simmer.
Stir in soy sauce, lime juice, and black pepper, and simmer for 3 minutes.
Return the blanched noodles to the pot, tossing to coat with the sauce.
Sprinkle the vegan cheddar cheese over the noodles, cover, and let it melt for 2 minutes.
Garnish with sliced scallions, chopped cilantro, and a pinch of chili flakes if desired.
Serve hot in bowls, adding extra lime wedges on the side.
Enjoy as a comforting, peppery, dairy-free dish for a sick-day recovery.
